items.content: Launch thread for the new AI writing assistant.
items.prompt: Write a Twitter thread announcing our AI writing assistant with a strong hook, three product benefits, and a clear CTA.

items.content: Instagram caption for a studio behind-the-scenes post.

items.content: LinkedIn update about product traction and customer learning.

items.content: Thread on building consistent content systems.
items.prompt: Write a Twitter thread about building a repeatable content system for startup founders with practical steps.
